arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Ruben Amorim makes request as star leaves door open for move
arts.sum: Manchester United transfer news as Ruben Amorim eyes a new forward at Old Trafford, while a defender keeps the door open for a possible move to the Theatre of Dreams in the future

arts.ttl: David Beckham says emotional goodbye to 'heartbeat of Man Utd' who looked after him
arts.sum: David Beckham has joined the ranks of the numerous former Manchester United players who have paid tribute to much-loved receptionist Kath Phipps after her sad death

arts.ttl: David Beckham pays tribute to ‘heartbeat of Manchester United’ Kath Phipps
arts.sum: The club confirmed Phipps’ death on Thursday, leading to a flood of tributes on social media from those that worked with her.

arts.ttl: PL Predictions: Forest can frustrate stale Man Utd
arts.sum: Our football betting expert Jones Knows is back to provide more Premier League insight ahead of the weekend card.

arts.ttl: David Beckham posts emotional tribute to Man United's much-loved receptionist Kath Phipps and shares image of his last visit to 'the heartbeat of the club' after her death at the age of 85
arts.sum: Several former Manchester United players and staff members also paid tribute to Phipps and Beckham shared his own message to her on Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba truth emerges after former Manchester United midfielder's return delayed
arts.sum: The latest on former Manchester United midfielder Paul Pogba as truth emerges over his proposed return at the recently cancelled King's Cup event

arts.ttl: Man United hint at first Ruben Amorim transfer after new 'concern' made clear
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will be working with the club behind the scenes to make some additions to his squad as the January transfer window approaches.

arts.ttl: Man United take extraordinary step as Nottingham Forest tickets placed on open sale - as Supporters' Trust urge club to backtrack on £66 ticket price
arts.sum: The move comes amid growing resentment among fans over the club's decision to raise the price of tickets for members to £66 and scrap concessions for children and pensioners.

arts.ttl: Man United flop Antony finds unlikely ally as Prime Minister posts bizarre compilation video
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony has struggled since arriving from Ajax in the summer of 2022 for £85m

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils send scouts to 'gather information' on Porto duo
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly send scouts to watch two Porto stars in Monday's 2-0 win over Ruben Amorim's former side Casa Pia.
